nodes.name: Send Email - Sales Manager Review Estimate

parameters.subject: =Your Apex Windows TX Request Has Been Received
parameters.html:
= Apex Windows TX
Apex Windows TX
Window Service Experts — Dallas-Fort Worth

Thank You, {{ $('Set - Build PDF URL').first().json.lead_name }}!

We have received your window service request and our team is reviewing the details you provided.

ℹ What happens next? — Our team will prepare your personalised quote and send it to you within 1 business day.
Response Time Within 1 business day
Phone (214) 000-0000
Website apexwindowstx.com

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to call us — we're happy to help.

We look forward to serving you!

Warm regards,
The Apex Windows TX Team

Apex Windows TX • Dallas-Fort Worth, TX • apexwindowstx.com

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Set - Build PDF URL').first().json.lead_id, estimate_id: $('Set - Build PDF URL').first().json.estimate_id }) }}

nodes.name: Set - Map Webhook to Form Fields

parameters.subject: =Form 2: HI {{ $json.lead_name }} Please provide your window details
parameters.html:
= Apex Windows TX
Apex Windows TX
Premium Window Installation & Replacement

Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out to Apex Windows TX! We have received your initial request.

To provide you with an accurate estimate, we need specific details for each of your windows (measurements, types, etc.). This helps us ensure the quote is exact and tailored to your needs.

Please click the button below to provide these details:

Submit Window Details
✓ Action Required — Submit your window details to receive your personalised quote.

If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
https://windowdetails.vercel.app/

Once submitted, our team will review the information and send your quote shortly.

Best regards,
The Apex Windows TX Team

Apex Windows TX Automation • This email was sent because you submitted a window quote request. If you did not request this, please disregard.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "MiniMax-Text-01", temperature: 0, response_format: { type: "json_object" }, messages: [{ role: "user", content: $('Code - Build AI Prompt').first().json.prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "MiniMax-Text-01", temperature: 0, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a lead qualification system for Apex Windows TX. Return only valid JSON. Copy ALL input fields EXACTLY as provided." }, { role: "user", content: "Qualify this lead and return structured JSON.

INPUT:
{"first_name":"" + $('IF - Validate Required Fields').first().json["First Name"] + "","last_name":"" + $('IF - Validate Required Fields').first().json["Last Name"] + "","email":"" + $('IF - Validate Required Fields').first().json["Email Address"] + "","phone":"" + $('IF - Validate Required Fields').first().json["Phone Number"] + "","street_address":"" + $('IF - Validate Required Fields').first().json["Street Address"] + "","city":"" + $('IF - Validate Required Fields').first().json["City"] + "","windows":" + $('IF - Validate Required Fields').first().json["Number of Windows"] + ","issue":"" + $('IF - Validate Required Fields').first().json["Describe Your Issue"] + ""}

RULES:
- is_window_related=true if issue relates to windows
- valid=true if email has @ AND phone not empty AND windows>=1 AND is_window_related
- confidence=90 if valid, 60 if minor issues, 30 if suspicious

Return ONLY this JSON, nothing else:
{"valid":true,"is_window_related":true,"confidence":90,"reason":"","lead":{"first_name":"","last_name":"","email":"","phone":"","street_address":"","city":"","issue":"","windows":1}}" }] }) }}
